theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

narrative.summary: Akash: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 52 / 중기 68 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: USA Rare Earth Rebuts MP Materials Lawsuit as Rivalry Deepens
top_news.summary: USA Rare Earth Inc. pushed back against allegations by MP Materials Corp., calling a lawsuit filed by its rival an attempt to hinder the company’s growth.

top_news.title: Gas Stations Accused of Using AI to Boost California Prices
top_news.summary: A group of California consumers claimed in a lawsuit that gas station owners including Walmart Inc., Marathon Petroleum Corp., BP Plc and 7-Eleven Inc. are using artificial intelligence to illegally manipulate pump prices in the state that already has the highest rates in the US.

top_news.title: Los Angeles Warehouse Fire Smoke Chokes Southern California for Fifth Day
top_news.summary: A fire at a cold storage warehouse near downtown Los Angeles continued pumping fumes across Southern California five days after it ignited, prompting emergency declarations as air quality reached unhealthy levels.

top_news.title: Oil Steadies as Iran Sales Waiver Signals Peace Talks Progress
top_news.summary: Oil steadied as traders weighed early progress in peace talks over the Iran war, which included a US waiver allowing some sales of barrels from the Islamic Republic.

top_news.title: Avis Set for $650 Million Pentwater Payout After Short Squeeze
top_news.summary: Avis Budget Group Inc. is set to receive $650 million in cash as part of a settlement agreement with Pentwater Capital Management to resolve a lawsuit regarding short-swing profits, according to a filing.

top_news.title: US Refiners Get Rare Chance to Buy Iranian Crude Again
top_news.summary: The Trump administration has temporarily eased some sanctions on Iranian oil, pausing hostilities that have defined US-Iran relations since the 1979 hostage crisis.

top_news.title: Schick Razor Maker Is Said to Reject Unsolicited Takeover Offer
top_news.summary: Edgewell Personal Care Co., which makes Schick razors, has rejected an unsolicited takeover offer from private equity firm Yellow Wood Partners, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Cotopaxi CEO: Luggage a ‘Natural Extension’ for Brand
top_news.summary: Lindsay Shumlas, CEO of Cotopaxi, discusses the company's recent expansion from backpacks into the luggage market with the launch of their new Coraza luggage line. The product, introduced about two months ago, emphasizes sustainability and durability through a repair-led model, contrasting with the typical replacement-focused luggage industry. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Qualcomm Nears Deal for AI Chip Startup Modular
top_news.summary: Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence chip startup at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Hedge Funds Piled Into Bearish Oil Bets Ahead of US-Iran MOU
top_news.summary: Hedge funds boosted bearish bets on US crude to the most in nearly five months on expectations that a preliminary peace deal between Washington and Tehran will boost Middle East oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
